item.title: Quantify Your Impact in 48 Hours 📊 • List 3 key projects or tasks you've completed. • Identify metrics or results for each—percentages, dollars, etc. • Use: “I increased sales by 20% in Q1.” as a template. • Research industry standards for comparison. • Refine bullets to highlight results over duties. How can you transform your resume bullets into impactful achievements? #resume #career #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Quantify Your Impact in 48 Hours 📊 • List 3 key projects or tasks you've completed. • Identify metrics or results for each—percentages, dollars, etc. • Use: “I increased sales by 20% in Q1.” as a template. • Research industry standards for comparison. • Refine bullets to highlight results over duties. How can you transform your resume bullets into impactful achievements? #resume #career #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
